fact_nuggets.text: Neuroforce (Japanese: Brain Force) is an Ability introduced during Generation VII, in Pokemon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. It is one of the signature Abilities of Necrozma.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pokemon with Neuroforce deal 25% more damage with supereffective moves, regardless of the effectiveness multiplier. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Neuroforce has no effect outside of battle.
